mapper.select: select * from biz_reservation_audit where order_id = #{orderId} order by node_no asc, id asc
select coalesce(max(node_no), 0) from biz_reservation_audit where order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: insert into biz_reservation_audit(order_id, node_no, auditor_id, auditor_role, audit_result, audit_opinion, audit_time, create_time) values(#{orderId}, #{nodeNo}, #{auditorId}, #{auditorRole}, #{auditResult}, #{auditOpinion}, #{auditTime}, #{createTime})
